scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/cli test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/zod test:coverage && pnpm --filter @br-validators/react-hook-form test:coverage
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @br-validators/core build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build
